name: Logistics Route Loss Calculator
description: Calculates total route loss (cost and time) for a logistics route, identifying hidden loss drivers and suggesting improvement actions based on industrial engineering standards (Lean, Six Sigma, WERC).

inputs.label: Route Distance (km)
inputs.businessContext: Total distance of the route from origin to destination.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total distance of the route from origin to destination.

inputs.label: Average Speed (km/h)
inputs.businessContext: Expected average speed under normal conditions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected average speed under normal conditions.

inputs.label: Planned Stops
inputs.businessContext: Number of planned stops along the route (e.g., for pickup/delivery).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of planned stops along the route (e.g., for pickup/delivery).

inputs.label: Average Stop Time (min)
inputs.businessContext: Average time spent per stop, including waiting and handling.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average time spent per stop, including waiting and handling.

inputs.label: Traffic Delay Factor
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of driving time lost due to traffic congestion (0 = none, 1 = 100% delay).

businessContext_i18n.en: Fraction of driving time lost due to traffic congestion (0 = none, 1 = 100% delay).

inputs.label: Fuel Cost per km
inputs.businessContext: Average fuel cost per kilometer for the vehicle type.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average fuel cost per kilometer for the vehicle type.

inputs.label: Driver Wage per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage of the driver (including benefits).

businessContext_i18n.en: Hourly wage of the driver (including benefits).

inputs.label: Vehicle Operating Cost per km
inputs.businessContext: Non-fuel operating costs per km (maintenance, tires, depreciation).

businessContext_i18n.en: Non-fuel operating costs per km (maintenance, tires, depreciation).

inputs.label: Load Value (currency)
inputs.businessContext: Total monetary value of the cargo being transported.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total monetary value of the cargo being transported.

inputs.label: Transit Time Target (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Target transit time for the route (used to compute time-based penalties).

businessContext_i18n.en: Target transit time for the route (used to compute time-based penalties).

inputs.label: Route Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of route affecting speed and delay assumptions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Type of route affecting speed and delay assumptions.

inputs.label: Use Real-Time Traffic Data
inputs.businessContext: If true, the calculator will adjust traffic delay factor based on real-time data (premium feature).

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, the calculator will adjust traffic delay factor based on real-time data (premium feature).

rules.message: Average speed and route distance must be positive.
Average stop time cannot be negative.
Traffic delay factor must be between 0 and 1.
All cost inputs must be non-negative.
Transit time target must be greater than zero.

thresholds.message: Fuel cost per km is above typical threshold (0.5 currency/km). Consider route optimization or vehicle efficiency review.
Number of planned stops exceeds 10. May increase idle time and handling losses.
Traffic delay factor exceeds 30%. Significant time loss expected. Consider alternative routing or time-of-day adjustments.
Target transit time is less than 120% of ideal driving time. Likely unrealistic without significant process improvements.

formulas.name: Ideal Driving Time
formulas.description: Time to cover the route without stops or delays.

formulas.name: Total Stop Time
formulas.description: Total time spent at planned stops.

formulas.name: Traffic Loss Time
formulas.description: Additional time lost due to traffic delays.

formulas.name: Total Transit Time
formulas.description: Actual total time from start to finish including stops and delays.

formulas.name: Time Loss Cost
formulas.description: Cost of driver time lost due to stops and delays.

formulas.name: Fuel and Operating Cost
formulas.description: Total variable cost for distance traveled.

formulas.name: Cargo Time Value Loss
formulas.description: Opportunity cost of cargo in transit beyond target time (using 5% annual cost of capital).

formulas.name: Total Route Loss
formulas.description: Primary result: total monetary loss for the route.

primary.label: Total Route Loss
primary.description: Aggregate monetary loss from time, fuel, operating, and cargo value loss.

time_loss_cost.label: Time Loss Cost
time_loss_cost.description: Cost of driver time lost due to stops and delays.

fuel_and_operating_cost.label: Fuel & Operating Cost
fuel_and_operating_cost.description: Total variable cost for distance traveled.

cargo_time_value_loss.label: Cargo Time Value Loss
cargo_time_value_loss.description: Opportunity cost of cargo in transit beyond target time.

ideal_driving_time_hours.label: Ideal Driving Time
ideal_driving_time_hours.description: Time to cover the route without stops or delays.

total_stop_time_hours.label: Total Stop Time
total_stop_time_hours.description: Total time spent at planned stops.

traffic_loss_hours.label: Traffic Loss Time
traffic_loss_hours.description: Additional time lost due to traffic delays.

total_transit_time_hours.label: Total Transit Time
total_transit_time_hours.description: Actual total time from start to finish.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Excessive Stop Time
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Stop time exceeds 15% of total transit time, indicating potential process waste (Lean muda).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: High Traffic Impact
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Traffic loss exceeds 10% of ideal driving time, suggesting need for route re-planning or time shifting.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Cargo Value at Risk
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Cargo time value loss is significant (>1% of load value), indicating high-value goods exposed to delays.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Fuel Inefficiency
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Fuel cost per km is above the 75th percentile for the route type (urban/highway/mixed).

suggestedActions.label: Consolidate Stops
suggestedActions.description: Combine or eliminate unnecessary stops to reduce idle time. Target: reduce stop count by 20%.
suggestedActions.expectedImpact: Reduces total stop time and associated driver cost.

suggestedActions.label: Optimize Route for Traffic
suggestedActions.description: Use real-time traffic data to avoid congestion. Consider alternative departure times.
suggestedActions.expectedImpact: Reduces traffic loss hours and fuel consumption.

suggestedActions.label: Increase Average Speed
suggestedActions.description: If route type allows, increase average speed by 5-10% through better planning and driver training.
suggestedActions.expectedImpact: Reduces ideal driving time and total transit time.

suggestedActions.label: Streamline Loading/Unloading
suggestedActions.description: Implement standardized processes (e.g., Lean 5S, cross-docking) to reduce average stop time by 10%.
suggestedActions.expectedImpact: Reduces total stop time and improves asset utilization.

suggestedActions.label: Review Fuel Efficiency
suggestedActions.description: Conduct vehicle maintenance, tire pressure checks, and driver eco-training to lower fuel cost per km.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Adjusted Loss
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Total route loss adjusted by a confidence factor (0.8 to 1.2) based on input data quality and completeness.
